title: The Red Circle
writer: Edgar Wallace, Egon Eis, Wolfgang Menge
actors: Renate Ewert, Klausjürgen Wussow, Karl-Georg Saebisch
plot: A strange, red circle appears on the neck of a man saved from the guillotine. What is its mysterious meaning? Tragically, it turns out to be something of a family curse, as each generation thereafter bears the same sign, which in ...
